title: repository and evidence baseline
gate: A fresh checkout installs with pinned pnpm, passes pnpm check, and imports @graphrefly/ts.
note: Local gates pass; a baseline commit and fresh-checkout verification remain.

title: canonical authority and project workflow system
gate: Every structured concern has one indexed JSONL authority; the sequencer and project skills pass reproducible repository validation; milestone provenance records the baseline commit.
note: Implementation and local gates are complete; blocked until OBS-0 has committed fresh-checkout evidence.

title: freeze the flagship demo contract
gate: One recognizable developer-workflow scenario specifies the exact cold failure, proposed procedure, warm behavior, verifier predicate, and 90-second judge path without a model-graded outcome.
note: Blocked until OBS-1 records baseline commit provenance.

title: lock domain contracts and invariants
gate: Versioned contracts and golden deterministic bytes cover relevant-applied, proposal-only, admission-rejected, irrelevant-applied, and wrong-scope-applied cases.

title: choose the smallest deployable architecture
gate: An accepted decision identifies the UI/build framework, server-only model boundary, GraphReFly seam, fixture storage, hosting target, and live-versus-replay data flow.
note: Starting hypothesis: one TypeScript application, browser replay UI, and a narrow server-only model boundary; no services split.

title: build the deterministic cold-to-warm slice
gate: All five cases pass locally and generate stable evidence bundles using a fixed memory fixture.
note: Build truth before live model integration.

title: integrate GPT-5.6 behind the verified seam
gate: A real structured GPT-5.6 response replaces the fixture without changing verifier semantics; provider failure falls back to replay safely.

title: design the observatory replay UI and evidence export
gate: A first-time user explains why the warm run passed after a 90-second walkthrough and can export a redacted bundle.
note: Lead with the changed decision and proof, not internal topology.

title: harden, demonstrate, and submit
gate: All submission records are done with evidence links and the Devpost entry is final before the deadline.
note: Run observatory-qa as the single final review gate.
